metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for smart Git workflows

plugins.name: smart-committer
plugins.description: Organizes uncommitted changes into logical commit groups with a smart-committer agent and /commit skill

plugins.name: pr-creator
plugins.description: Creates well-structured pull requests with automatic base branch detection, Japanese descriptions, and screenshot support for UI changes

plugins.name: conflict-guard
plugins.description: Warns about potential merge conflicts with the base branch before editing files via PreToolUse hook
